title: Quest 36569 Espresso Coffee Machine With Milk Frother / 1.2L Water Tank and Drip Tray/Steam Ready and Temperature Indicator/For Ground Coffee Beans / 15 Bars of Pressure
features: RETRO COFFEE MACHINE – This high-performance retro coffee machine has 15 bars of pressure, so that delicious coffees can be made in minutes. In a sleek, black retro design that will complement any kitchen – enjoying barista style coffee at home has never been easier.

MILK FROTHER WITH STEAM CONTROL – The machine is suitable for use with ground coffee beans and the traditional milk frother allows you to make espressos, cappuccinos, lattes, or flat whites in no time. The steam pressure control lets you create your froth exactly how you like it. You can also add ice to create your favourite iced coffees.

WATER TANK AND DRIP TRAY – The coffee machine includes a 1.2L detachable transparent tank for easy refills. You can add enough water to make 4/5 drinks at once which is ideal for when entertaining guests. The removable drip tray means it is easy to keep clean and there’s even space on top of the machine to store 4 espresso cups.

STEAM AND TEMPERATURE INDICATORS - Once the steam is ready to use, an indicator will come on so you know you can start frothing your milk or coffee. The temperature indicator will turn on once the coffee has reached a suitable temperature, so you can avoid burning your coffee.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page High Quality Coffee This machine uses ground coffee beans with 15 bars of pressure to create a perfect barista style cup Classy Retro Design The barista-style machine has a classic style thermometer & steam control dial for authentic charm. Precise Controls Adjust the thermometer, pump control, and your preferred style of steam via the buttons & dial. Milk Frother Included A steam pressure-controlled milk frother is built into the machine for espressos, lattes, and more. Built-In Cup Holder A cup holder is built into the top of the machine, so you can prepare up to 4 cups in advance. Next page 1 High Quality Coffee 2 Classy Retro Design 3 Precise Controls 4 Milk Frother Included 5 Built-In Cup Holder
